title: pedicularis gruina subsp. polyphylla
intro: Pedicularis gruina subsp. polyphylla is a subspecies of flowering plant in the balsam family, known for its unique appearance and medicinal properties. It has been used traditionally to treat various health conditions, including fever, sore throats, and respiratory issues, due to its antipyretic, anti-inflammatory, and expectorant properties. The health benefits of Pedicularis gruina subsp. polyphylla include reduced inflammation, improved respiratory function, and enhanced immune system response. Herbal preparations of this plant include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat a range of health issues.
